decision_title: Login via SSO through external Portal
evidence_quotes: Users will log in exclusively via SSO through the external Portal.

decision_title: System will not implement its own login or registration
evidence_quotes: This system will not implement its own login or registration functionality.

decision_title: Photo upload is a core V1 feature
Output modeling is a core V1 feature
Sidebar must distinguish between 'Album' and 'Project' folder types
evidence_quotes: The sidebar needs to distinguish between two folder types — 'Album' and 'Project' — managing photos and modeling data separately
The Album must support adding, deleting, and searching photos
The Album must support adding, deleting, and searching photos
The Album must support adding, deleting, and searching photos

decision_title: Modeling progress must be shown as a progress bar
evidence_quotes: Modeling progress must be shown as a progress bar, displaying the status of each stage (AT computing, point cloud generation, model generation, etc.)

decision_title: Modeling progress bar must display status of each stage
evidence_quotes: Modeling progress must be shown as a progress bar, displaying the status of each stage (AT computing, point cloud generation, model generation, etc.)

decision_title: Users can select photos from photo list to import into project folder when creating a project
evidence_quotes: When creating a project, users can select photos from the photo list to import into the project folder

decision_title: Project sharing is a future feature
evidence_quotes: Project sharing: A project folder can designate other users to jointly view the modeling results

decision_title: Albums are private and do not support multi-user access (future)
evidence_quotes: Albums are private to the owner only and do not support multi-user access

decision_title: Resumable uploads are a future feature
evidence_quotes: Resumable uploads: If an upload is interrupted, upload progress is preserved via a caching mechanism, supporting resume-from-breakpoint

decision_title: Storage quota management is a future feature
evidence_quotes: Storage quota management: The user's personal page displays used and remaining storage

decision_title: Photo-upload limit can be dynamically adjusted (future)
evidence_quotes: each user's photo-upload limit can be dynamically adjusted based on system settings and permissions

decision_title: AT error handling with parameter adjustment is a future feature
evidence_quotes: AT error handling: When AT computation fails, provide a mechanism to adjust parameters and re-run

decision_title: Expert mode is a future feature
evidence_quotes: Expert mode: After photo upload, distinguish between 'Normal Mode' (default parameters) and 'Expert Mode' (freely adjustable parameters)

decision_title: V1 will implement Normal Mode only
evidence_quotes: V1 will implement Normal Mode only
